Meta.title: Heroes — Virtual Challenge
Meta.description: Every step becomes an adventure. Mt. Fuji, the 47 Ronin, Japanese Railways. The more you move, the more the world changes.

Hero.label: Virtual Challenge · 2026
Hero.subtitle: Mt. Fuji, the 47 Ronin, Japanese Railways. The more you move, the more the world changes.

Challenges.label: Challenge Routes
Challenges.title: Explore Japan, step by step
Challenges.fujiDesc: Climb to the summit via the Yoshida trail, with real mountain hut landmarks along the way.
Challenges.roninDesc: Walk the path of the 47 Ronin through historically significant locations of loyalty and honor.
Challenges.railwayDesc: Ride Japan's famous rail lines, with real train stations as landmarks on your journey.

Medal.label: Earn something real
Medal.title: Not a digital badge. A real medal.
Medal.description: Complete a challenge 100% and receive a premium medal shipped worldwide in original packaging. Not digital — something you can hold in your hands.

Features.label: App Features
Features.title: Make your adventure more fun
Features.mapDesc: View your challenge route in real time with 3 Mapbox styles.
Features.trackingDesc: Track participants on the map in real time.
Features.teamDesc: Challenge together with real-time chat and leaderboards.
Features.achievementsDesc: 10 categories, 5 rarities — from Common to Legendary.
Features.streaksDesc: Track consecutive activity days to stay motivated.
Features.feedDesc: Connect with fellow adventurers through posts, likes, and comments.

Impact.label: Every step makes an impact
Impact.title: The more you move, the more the world changes.
Impact.treeDesc: Partnering with forest projects to plant real trees through certified reforestation programs. Your steps build forests.
Impact.oceanDesc: Working with ocean partners to reduce plastic pollution. Adventure while protecting our seas.

CTA.title: Start your adventure.
CTA.subtitle: Download now and take the first step.

Contact.label: Contact
Contact.title: Send us a message
Contact.name: Name
Contact.messagePlaceholder: We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.success: Sent! Thank you for reaching out.
Contact.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
